Trying to open original ImgBB quality.

admin panel

you can paste direct links, [img]...[/img], full BBCode, HTML <img src="...">, or even several links at once

use direct ImgBB links like https://i.ibb.co/...

How to add, delete, or replace photo: choose tab → choose series / category → choose photo location (main or board) → paste a link or BBCode → press Add Photo(s), or choose a thumbnail below and press Delete Selected Photo / Update Selected Photo Link

you can create separate series / categories inside every tab, like Rich Man or Dirty Work

inside every series / category you can also create optional boards, like Energy teasers or Speed teasers

press CMD/CTRL + ENTER to quickly add pasted photo links

press SHIFT+TAB to open or close the panel, ESC closes it
